sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n661" key="a)glaofeggh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγλαο-φεγγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n661.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">splendidly shining</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:189" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">189</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
